SiteColumn.name: TaxKeyword
SiteColumn.description: Enterprise Keywords are shared with other users and applications to allow for ease of search and filtering, as well as metadata consistency and reuse

SiteColumn.name: _DCDateModified
SiteColumn.description: The date on which this resource was last modified

SiteColumn.name: _Author
SiteColumn.description: The primary author

SiteColumn.name: XSLStyleIconUrl
SiteColumn.description: A 64x48 icon that represents this style

SiteColumn.name: HealthRuleCheckEnabled
SiteColumn.description: If selected, SharePoint will periodically look for this problem.

SiteColumn.name: CompatibleManagedProperties
SiteColumn.description: Enter the names of the managed properties that you would like to use this Filter Display Template with. The managed properties with names that start with the values you enter will be able to use this Display Template.

SiteColumn.name: ManagedPropertyMapping
SiteColumn.description: Enter the slots and the managed properties that map to the slots. This field will be used to determine which managed properties are retrieved from SharePoint Search when you are using this Display Template. Use the format "slot name":"property name", separated by commas.

SiteColumn.name: DisplayTemplateJSTargetListTemplate
SiteColumn.description: ID of the list template type this override applies to.

SiteColumn.name: CrawlerXSLFile
SiteColumn.description: Add an XSL file to be used to generate HTML when crawlers are viewing the page.

SiteColumn.name: HealthReportServices
SiteColumn.description: The services for which the health analyzer rule failed.

SiteColumn.name: _Relation
SiteColumn.description: References to related resources

SiteColumn.name: HealthRuleVersion
SiteColumn.description: Version

SiteColumn.name: HealthRuleAutoRepairEnabled
SiteColumn.description: If Repair Automatically is selected, SharePoint will attempt to repair errors as soon as they are found.

SiteColumn.name: _Identifier
SiteColumn.description: An identifying string or number, usually conforming to a formal identification system

SiteColumn.name: XSLStyleWPType
SiteColumn.description: Specify the type of web part this style is intended for.  For default list views, choose XSLTListViewWebPart.

SiteColumn.name: _ResourceType
SiteColumn.description: A set of categories, functions, genres or aggregation levels

SiteColumn.name: DisplayTemplateJSTargetControlType
SiteColumn.description: Type of control defined in this Display Template.

SiteColumn.name: HealthRuleReportLink
SiteColumn.description: A link to the settings page that controls if and when this rule is run.

SiteColumn.name: _Contributor
SiteColumn.description: One or more people or organizations that contributed to this resource

SiteColumn.name: DisplayTemplateLevel
SiteColumn.description: Select the level of data that this display template expects and is designed to display.  This determines where this template will appear as a selectable option in configuration UIs.

SiteColumn.name: XSLStyleRequiredFields
SiteColumn.description: The required fields for this style in the format: field1; field2;

SiteColumn.name: CanvasContent1
SiteColumn.description: This column stores the content of the authoring canvas in a site page.

SiteColumn.name: TargetControlType
SiteColumn.description: Select the search controls that will use this Display Template.

SiteColumn.name: IsQuestion
SiteColumn.description: I am asking a question and want to get answers from other members.

SiteColumn.name: HealthRuleSchedule
SiteColumn.description: Determines when the rules are checked automatically

SiteColumn.name: CompatibleSearchDataTypes
SiteColumn.description: Select the Search managed property data types that this Filter Display Template will be used with. If you don't enter any values, the Display Template will be available for all data types.

SiteColumn.name: HealthReportServers
SiteColumn.description: The servers on which the health analyzer rule failed during the most recent execution.

SiteColumn.name: HealthReportRemedy
SiteColumn.description: Steps which may be taken to resolve the reported problem

SiteColumn.name: DisplayTemplateJSTemplateType
SiteColumn.description: Option to include this override during view selection.

SiteColumn.name: XSLStyleBaseView
SiteColumn.description: The view style ID for this style

SiteColumn.name: _Publisher
SiteColumn.description: The person, organization or service that published this resource

SiteColumn.name: _Coverage
SiteColumn.description: The extent or scope

SiteColumn.name: _Comments
SiteColumn.description: A summary of this resource

SiteColumn.name: HealthReportSeverity
SiteColumn.description: The severity of the reported problem

SiteColumn.name: HealthRuleScope
SiteColumn.description: The rule scope determines where the rule file is run. If the rule scope is set to All, the rule file will run on all computers with the specified service. If the rule scope is set to Any, the rule file will run on the first available computer with the specified service.

SiteColumn.name: DisplayTemplateJSIconUrl
SiteColumn.description: Icon to be displayed for this override.

SiteColumn.name: _RightsManagement
SiteColumn.description: Information about rights held in or over this resource

SiteColumn.name: HealthReportSeverityIcon
SiteColumn.description: The severity of the reported problem

SiteColumn.name: LayoutWebpartsContent
SiteColumn.description: This column stores the content of webparts in page layout in a site page.

SiteColumn.name: _Source
SiteColumn.description: References to resources from which this resource was derived

SiteColumn.name: _Format
SiteColumn.description: Media-type, file format or dimensions

SiteColumn.name: _DCDateCreated
SiteColumn.description: The date on which this resource was created

SiteColumn.name: DisplayTemplateJSTargetScope
SiteColumn.description: URL of the website this override applies to.

SiteColumn.name: HealthReportExplanation
SiteColumn.description: A detailed explanation of the reported problem

SiteColumn.name: TemplateHidden
SiteColumn.description: Hide this Display Template where people select from an available list of search Display Templates.

SiteColumn.name: HealthReportCategory
SiteColumn.description: The category of the reported problem

SiteColumn.name: DisplayTemplateJSTemplateHidden
SiteColumn.description: Hide this Display Template option when creating new views.

SiteColumn.name: XSLStyleCategory
SiteColumn.description: The category or content types compatible with this style

headers.content-security-policy-report-only: default-src 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev;child-src 'self';connect-src 'self' https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.sentry.io https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev wss://api.nango.dev/ https://connect.nango.dev https://*.posthog.com https://*.stripe.com;font-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com;frame-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev https://www.youtube.com https://*.stripe.com;img-src 'self' data: https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com https://img.logo.dev https://*.ytimg.com;manifest-src 'self';media-src 'self';object-src 'self';script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.stripe.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://apis.google.com https://*.posthog.com https://www.youtube.com;style-src blob: 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev;worker-src blob: 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com;base-uri 'self';form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';script-src-attr 'none';upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.access-control-expose-headers: Authorization, Etag, Content-Type, Content-Length, X-Nango-Signature, X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
